## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and what problem does it solve? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing (`python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -p "test_*.py"`)
- [ ] `ruff check .` is clean
- [ ] Docs updated (README / docs/design.md) if behavior changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under "Unreleased"
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies
- [ ] Hooks still fail open; archiver still errs toward keeping
